easy.title: Basic Article Structured Data
easy.description: Create a JSON-LD structured data block for a blog article. The article is titled 'Getting Started with HTML' and was published on June 1, 2026. The author is 'Alex Turner' and the publisher is 'WebDev Academy'. Include a brief description and an image URL.
easy.solution:
<script type="application/ld+json">
{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "Article",
  "headline": "Getting Started with HTML",
  "author": {
    "@type": "Person",
    "name": "Alex Turner"
  },
  "datePublished": "2026-06-01",
  "description": "A beginner-friendly guide to HTML, covering the basics of web page structure and essential elements.",
  "publisher": {
    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "WebDev Academy"
  },
  "image": "https://example.com/images/html-guide.jpg"
}
</script>

medium.title: Product with Reviews and FAQs
medium.description: Create a complete page with structured data for a product listing. The product is 'SmartHome Thermostat' by 'EcoTemp' priced at $129.99 USD (in stock). It has an aggregate rating of 4.2 from 342 reviews. Also include two FAQ entries about installation and warranty on the same page.
medium.starterCode:
<!-- Product structured data -->
<script type="application/ld+json">
{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "Product",
  "name": "",
  "description": "",
  "brand": {
    "@type": "Brand",
    "name": ""
  },
  "offers": {
    "@type": "Offer",
    "price": "",
    "priceCurrency": "",
    "availability": ""
  },
  "aggregateRating": {
    "@type": "AggregateRating",
    "ratingValue": "",
    "reviewCount": ""
  }
}
</script>

<!-- FAQ structured data -->
<script type="application/ld+json">
{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "FAQPage",
  "mainEntity": []
}
</script>
medium.solution:
<!-- Product structured data -->
<script type="application/ld+json">
{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "Product",
  "name": "SmartHome Thermostat",
  "description": "An intelligent Wi-Fi thermostat that learns your schedule and optimizes energy usage.",
  "brand": {
    "@type": "Brand",
    "name": "EcoTemp"
  },
  "offers": {
    "@type": "Offer",
    "price": "129.99",
    "priceCurrency": "USD",
    "availability": "https://schema.org/InStock"
  },
  "aggregateRating": {
    "@type": "AggregateRating",
    "ratingValue": "4.2",
    "reviewCount": "342"
  }
}
</script>

<!-- FAQ structured data -->
<script type="application/ld+json">
{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "FAQPage",
  "mainEntity": [
    {
      "@type": "Question",
      "name": "Is the SmartHome Thermostat easy to install?",
      "acceptedAnswer": {
        "@type": "Answer",
        "text": "Yes, the SmartHome Thermostat comes with a step-by-step installation guide and video tutorial. Most users complete installation in under 30 minutes."
      }
    },
    {
      "@type": "Question",
      "name": "What warranty does the SmartHome Thermostat come with?",
      "acceptedAnswer": {
        "@type": "Answer",
        "text": "The SmartHome Thermostat includes a 2-year limited warranty covering manufacturing defects and hardware malfunctions."
      }
    }
  ]
}
</script>

hard.title: Event Page with Multiple Entities and Graph
hard.description: Create a complete event page with structured data using the @graph pattern. The page is for a 'Music Festival 2026' (July 15-17, 2026 at Central Park, New York). Include BreadcrumbList (Home > Events > Music Festival 2026), Event details with three performers (using the Performer role), ticket offers (General: $149, VIP: $299), and Organization data for the event organizer 'LiveEvents Inc.'.
hard.starterCode:
<script type="application/ld+json">
{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@graph": [
    // WebPage with BreadcrumbList
    // Event with performers and offers
    // Organization for event organizer
  ]
}
</script>
hard.solution:
<script type="application/ld+json">
{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@graph": [
    {
      "@type": "WebPage",
      "name": "Music Festival 2026",
      "breadcrumb": {
        "@type": "BreadcrumbList",
        "itemListElement": [
          {
            "@type": "ListItem",
            "position": 1,
            "name": "Home",
            "item": "https://example.com"
          },
          {
            "@type": "ListItem",
            "position": 2,
            "name": "Events",
            "item": "https://example.com/events"
          },
          {
            "@type": "ListItem",
            "position": 3,
            "name": "Music Festival 2026",
            "item": "https://example.com/events/music-festival-2026"
          }
        ]
      }
    },
    {
      "@type": "Event",
      "name": "Music Festival 2026",
      "startDate": "2026-07-15T10:00:00",
      "endDate": "2026-07-17T23:00:00",
      "location": {
        "@type": "Place",
        "name": "Central Park",
        "address": {
          "@type": "PostalAddress",
          "addressLocality": "New York",
          "addressRegion": "NY"
        }
      },
      "performer": [
        {
          "@type": "MusicGroup",
          "name": "The Electric Waves"
        },
        {
          "@type": "MusicGroup",
          "name": "Solar Flare Band"
        },
        {
          "@type": "Person",
          "name": "DJ Starlight"
        }
      ],
      "offers": [
        {
          "@type": "Offer",
          "name": "General Admission",
          "price": "149",
          "priceCurrency": "USD",
          "availability": "https://schema.org/InStock"
        },
        {
          "@type": "Offer",
          "name": "VIP Pass",
          "price": "299",
          "priceCurrency": "USD",
          "availability": "https://schema.org/LimitedAvailability"
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "@type": "Organization",
      "name": "LiveEvents Inc.",
      "url": "https://liveevents.example.com",
      "contactPoint": {
        "@type": "ContactPoint",
        "telephone": "+1-800-555-FEST",
        "contactType": "event booking"
      }
    }
  ]
}
</script>
